meta.description: API Arena is a competitive platform where developers ship real Spring Boot APIs, get scored by real builds and HTTP tests, and climb XP and ELO rankings.

alphaAria: API Arena is in alpha — early access

hero.sub:
The first competitive arena for <1>APIs.
Submit your Spring Boot project. Pass the tests. <2>Own the leaderboard.
No simulations. No theory-only drills. Real code in real production conditions.

stacks.note: Spring Boot only for now — more runtimes on the way.

about.label: What is API Arena?
about.desc:
Build an API that solves the challenge. Submit your code.
Our system runs it in an isolated sandbox and <1>stress-tests it with automated checks, performance analysis, REST validation, and a heuristic code-review pass (LLM review coming soon).

Your score enters the leaderboard. <2>In real time.
Improve, resubmit, and climb positions.
about.metricsExampleNote: Bars show point caps — not a sample grade. HTTP tests and code review are scored in separate blocks.
about.scoreReviewMode: Automated heuristics today · LLM review coming soon

steps.desc: Explore challenges across difficulty levels. CRUD, Auth, Performance, Design. Each includes API specification and hidden tests.
Ship a Spring Boot API today (more stacks coming soon). Dockerize it, zip your project, and upload it to the arena.
Your API runs in an isolated container. Automated tests, performance analysis with 1000 RPS, REST validation, and heuristic code review (LLM review coming soon).
Your score enters the leaderboard in real time. Analyze replay, iterate your API, resubmit, and climb positions.

features.label: Arsenal
features.aside: Multidimensional evaluation. It is not only whether your API works - it is how well it works.

items.title: Isolated Sandbox
items.desc: Docker-in-Docker. Your API runs in a fully isolated environment with CPU and RAM limits. No tricks, no shortcuts.

items.title: AI Review
items.desc: A heuristic rubric scores structure, safety signals, and API hygiene on every submission (0–200 today). Provider-based LLM review is coming soon.

items.title: Replay System
items.desc: Replay every request, every response, every metric. Analyze where it failed step by step.

items.title: Multiplayer
items.desc: 1v1 real-time duels on the roadmap — same challenge, same clock, best score wins.

items.title: Real-Time Metrics
items.desc: Integrated InfluxDB + Grafana. P95/P99 response times, throughput, error rates, all while your API runs.

leaderboard.label: Competition
leaderboard.desc:
The leaderboard updates through WebSocket. Every incoming submission and every position change appears instantly, no refresh needed.

The ELO system ensures that climbing one spot in the top 10 matters more than dominating the top 100.

cta.label: Season 01 · Early Access
cta.sub: Early access open · No credit card required
cta.fine: Free during alpha · No credit card required

footer.project: Proyecto TFG · Ciclo Formativo de Grado Superior
